label: AppleScript • liveProof verbatim note round-trip
query: In Notes, create a note named 'Osaurus Eval Scratch' if it does not already exist, set its body to the provided content, then read the body back and report the exact text.
notes: Ground-truth lane: the REAL model + the REAL AppleScriptExecutor against actual Notes. HAS REAL SIDE EFFECTS — it writes a dedicated scratch note — and needs Notes + Automation permission, so it is meant to be run locally, permission-gated. Proves verbatim fidelity end to end: the model's own read-back must return the provided content (a distinctive phrase is asserted in the captured value). Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

appleScript.content:
Osaurus verbatim proof:
- alpha bravo charlie
- "quoted" — dashed
- 100% done
rubric: The AppleScript sets the body of the 'Osaurus Eval Scratch' note to the provided content and reads it back.
The reported text matches the provided content verbatim, including punctuation and line breaks.
